commands.review_summary:
This PR adds GitHub-backed skill source sync across Convex schema/actions/crons, install resolver and CLI install/update, official-publisher settings/profile UI, tests/specs, and a scheduled live-check workflow.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defects by source inspection: the pending moderation helper returns `active`, the public visibility helper accepts active skills, and the CLI install helper ignores `resolution.github.contentHash`. I did not run tests because this review is required to keep the checkout read-only.
